contradicting_sources.quoted_passage: the projected adoption rate is not supported by comparable rollouts
contradicting_sources.why_it_contradicts: assessment assumes 40% adoption; source shows comparable products reached 12%

contradicting_sources.quoted_passage: regulatory approval timelines average 18 months in this jurisdiction
switching costs in this segment are low

findings.targets: the assumption of 40% adoption in year one
findings.resolution: revised projection to 12-18% with sensitivity band

self_eval.note: SELF-score, not the blind eval — not evidence

outcome: Conclusion held but adoption assumption materially weakened; confidence lowered.
